message:
fix(fcp-sdk): correct off-by-one in HttpRetryConfig max_retries to max_attempts conversion

HttpRetryConfig.max_retries semantically means "retries after the initial
request," but to_retry_policy() was passing it directly as max_attempts
(which includes the initial request). This caused max_retries: 0 to
produce max_attempts: 0 (no request at all) instead of 1 (initial only).

Fix: use saturating_add(1) so max_retries: N produces max_attempts: N+1.
Update doc comment and three unit tests to reflect corrected semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
